productDisplayName: BIBA Women Printed Multi Coloured Kurta
description: Composition Multi coloured printed sleeveless kurta made of 100% cotton, has a curved spread collar, full front buttoned placket and a vented hem Fit Regular Wash care Wash separately in cold water Do not bleach Dry in shade Warm iron; do not iron on decorations This sleeveless multi-coloured kurta from biba is subtly stylish and adds to your femininity. The soft cotton keeps you fresh all day while you go about your errands in exemplary comfort. Wear this over leggings or denims depending on the occasion. Smart enough to wear to the office or to a formal party, dress this kurta up by wearing bold earrings and bangles. Model statistics The product is a size 36 on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
